title: localStorage
body:
## Definition

**localStorage** stores string key-value pairs (~5MB) per origin, persisting until explicitly cleared.

## Why it exists

Simple client persistence for preferences, drafts, non-sensitive UI state.

## How it works

```js
localStorage.setItem("theme", "dark");
```

Synchronous — can block main thread on large reads. Same-origin only. Accessible to any script on page — [XSS](concept:xss) can exfiltrate.

## In practice

Prefer IndexedDB for large data; never store tokens if XSS risk; use httpOnly cookies for sensitive session.
bodyLinked:
## Definition

**[localStorage](concept:local-storage)** stores string key-value pairs (~5MB) per origin, persisting until explicitly cleared.

## Why it exists

Simple client persistence for preferences, drafts, non-sensitive [UI state](concept:server-state-vs-client-state).

## How it works

```js
localStorage.setItem("theme", "dark");
```

Synchronous — can block main thread on large reads. Same-origin only. [Accessible](concept:accessibility-a11y) to any script on page — [XSS](concept:xss) can exfiltrate.

## In practice

Prefer IndexedDB for large data; never store tokens if [XSS](concept:xss) risk; use httpOnly [cookies](concept:cookies) for sensitive session.
